tagline: The /settings and /rename slash commands are no longer available in the notebook Genie Code Assistant chat pane.
what_it_does: The /settings and /rename slash commands are no longer available in the notebook Genie Code Assistant chat pane. Adjust notebook settings and rename notebooks from the notebook UI instead. Other slash commands, such as /doc, /explain, /fix, /optimize, and /prettify, are unchanged.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The /settings and /rename slash commands are no longer available in the notebook Genie Code Assistant chat pane. Adjust notebook settings and rename notebooks from the notebook UI instead.
key_takeaway: The /settings and /rename slash commands are no longer available in the notebook Genie Code Assistant chat pane.
